sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps_example (id INT, startdate TIMESTAMPTZ, enddate TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO timestamps_example (id, startdate, enddate) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-09-30 23:59:59', TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-10-01 01:58:00');
SELECT id, date_sub('hour', startdate, enddate) AS hours_difference FROM timestamps_example;
UPDATE timestamps_example SET enddate = TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-10-01 02:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_sub('hour', startdate, enddate) AS updated_hours_difference FROM timestamps_example WHERE id = 1;
